name: go2-foxglove
description: Unitree Go2 → Foxglove streaming + ROS 2 drive/map/record stack.

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Go2 controller IP on the robot LAN (camera WebRTC + ROS 2 NIC selection).

variables.name: GO2_DDS_ADDRESS
variables.description: This device's IP on the robot LAN; DDS binds to it by address.

variables.name: FOXGLOVE_PORT
variables.description: Foxglove WebSocket port served by the bridge.
